branch.frontier_task_title: v6.7 frontier: integrate governance audits into release sign-off
branch.branch_summary: Implement TASK-075 release-state-audit integration: make release-state-audit consume archmap-impact-audit, review-provenance-audit, and evidence-independence-audit, and fill empty command help inputs/outputs where still missing. Verification gate: release-state-audit fails when any v6.7 governance audit fails; command help benchmark remains green; unit tests pass. Stop condition: integration only; no new audit families. QIF boundary: integrated audit pass is structural/runtime release-readiness evidence, not proof of semantic product quality.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-075 sits on v6.7 after shipped v6.6.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.7 Verifiable Governance: make missing archmap impact dispositions, self-attested review provenance, and low-independence evidence machine-detectable so release sign-off can fail on structural self-attestation instead of trusting maker claims.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-075: v6.7 frontier: integrate governance audits into release sign-off
